Bug / Task Description: The P-square estimator in internal/quantile/quantile.go tracks five markers and, on each post-bootstrap Observe, finds the cell a sample falls into via findCell, then bumps marker counts above that cell. When a sample is a new maximum the returned cell index is off, so the highest interior marker stops being incremented and its desired position drifts from its actual position; on a steadily increasing stream the Value() estimate gets stuck near the bootstrap value instead of tracking the true quantile. Cells are the inter-marker gaps.
Commit Subject: fix(quantile): correct cell for new-maximum samples
